title: Nagqu Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Nagqu, with a Z-Score of -4.40. This event has reached a critical level, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Nagqu are extremely cold, with a high Z-Score indicating a significant deviation from normal temperatures. 
 The relative humidity is at 85%, and the wind speed is moderate at 5.8 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) are at 16.4 GG, while the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) are at 0.0 GG, indicating a high demand for heating.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
